steps.note: +request <title>=<desc> submits to the default SPHERE bucket. +request/create <bucket>/<title>=<desc> targets a specific bucket.

steps.cmd: +request North Exit Broken=The north exit from the Market leads to a void room instead of the Docks.
steps.label: submit to default (SPHERE) bucket

steps.expect: >JOBS: Request #1 "North Exit Broken" submitted to SPHERE.

steps.cmd: +request/create BUG/Login Crash=The game crashes when I try to connect from a mobile client.
steps.label: submit to BUG bucket explicitly

steps.note: +requests (or +myjobs) lists every open request you submitted or were added to as a viewer. +request <#> shows one request in full detail.

steps.expect: The north exit from the Market leads to a void room instead of the Docks.

steps.note: +request/comment <#>=<text> appends a visible comment. +request/addplayer <#>=<name> grants read access to another player.

steps.cmd: +request/comment 1=Still happening after relogging. Can reproduce every time.
steps.label: add a comment to request #1
add viewer (self-lookup to prove target resolution works)
view request #1 showing the new comment

steps.expect: Still happening after relogging. Can reproduce every time.

steps.note: +request/cancel <#> cancels your own request and moves it to the archive with status 'cancelled'.
